title: encephalartos horridus var. nanus
intro: Encephalartos horridus var. nanus is a dwarf variety of the cycad plant, Encephalartos horridus, native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Encephalartos horridus var. nanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas or infusions, and are used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
